title: Dreaming of Kissing: Love and Agreement
seoDescription: What does it mean to kiss someone in a dream? Love, reconciliation, approval, lust, betrayal (Judas kiss), and sealing.
introduction: Kissing is a seal. Dreaming of kissing symbolizes **'Love'**, approval, and unity. Who and where you kiss is very important. Kissing on the forehead signifies respect, kissing on the lips signifies passion, and kissing the hand signifies reverence.
symbolism:
The state of kissing:

**Kissing on the Lips:** Symbolizes sealing passion, love, and agreements (breath exchange).

**Kissing on the Cheek:** Indicates friendship, greeting, and sincere support.

**Kissing the Hand:** Signifies respect, humility, seeking forgiveness, or expecting help from someone.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** Kissing symbolizes that you are nurturing the seeds of new beginnings and relationships. During this period, you may feel that new opportunities related to love and commitment are on the horizon; this is a process of spiritual and emotional renewal.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** At this stage, it is a time for deepening and growing in your relationships, along with the passion and sincerity that kissing brings. You should be open to positive changes in relationships and have the courage to express your feelings; this will transform you both as an individual and as a partner.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The full moon signifies the inner power of kissing and that love has reached its peak. Your dream indicates that you will experience enlightenment regarding love and commitment, and that it is time to share these feelings more openly with those around you.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** This phase stands out as a time to release past relationships and emotions. The meaning of kissing, along with respect and reverence, indicates your desire to learn from past mistakes and move forward, seeking to establish healthier connections.
commonScenarios: Kissing the dead: Symbolizes legacy, long life, or living like them.
Kissing an enemy: Indicates making peace (or betrayal - Judas) or overcoming them (I kissed, goodbye).
Forcibly kissing: Shows boundary violation, pressure, and an unwanted situation.
cta: The dream of kissing asks who you love. Download the Dream Boat app to seal your love.
